name: google-ads-general
description: Google Ads GENERAL deliverables for Inbound CPH: standalone outputs that aren't tied to building or tuning a single campaign. ads-audit-report (full paid-search audit to a polished HTML slide deck + rendered PDF), ads-changelog (build a changelog/optimeringslog entry from Google Ads' own change-history — per client, or per specialist across their accounts — collapse bulk uploads, format-matched draft to paste into the client's Drive changelog), editor-csv-export (convert a confirmed Google Ads review workbook into the per-entity Google Ads Editor import CSVs — reads BOTH dialects on one contract: the campaign-build assembler workbook AND the optimization-loop review workbook; Editor imports CSV only, not .xlsx; pure transform, re-runs the no-Broad + length guards, never pushes to the account), ai-context-publish (publish per-client AI Context Google Docs to Drive + maintain a master client-index: resolves each client's Google Ads / HubSpot / ClickUp IDs, finds the client's paid-search folder, and writes a native Google Doc holding the cleaned Klientoverblik context — a vault-to-Drive publishing skill that never touches a Google Ads account; human-in-the-loop on Drive writes, create-once since the Drive connector has no delete/update). kontekst-opdater (on-demand per-client AI-context UPDATE + a project-manager overview in one run, everything on Drive: starts in the master client-index as entry point, opens the client's AI-Context file, fans out one read-only expert subagent per source — Drive docs, HubSpot activity, and the newest client status deck (Google Slides, in the main client folder) — all filtered to what's new since the AI-Context file's 'Sidst opdateret' line, then proposes a critical TILFØJ/ERSTAT/FJERN diff to that file's Klientoverblik with human-in-the-loop gating on every replace/delete, and writes the updated AI-Context file in place via the Workspace MCP with a copy-paste fallback; honors the timeless-only rule, never writes live metrics into context; maintains the file ai-context-publish first created, never re-creates it). All Ads-touching skills are read-only against Google Ads (recommend-only, never write to the account); ai-context-publish doesn't read the account at all, and kontekst-opdater is read-only against both Ads and HubSpot. opstart-analyse (new-client ONBOARDING: walk the agency's ClickUp 'Opstartscheckliste: Analysearbejdet (Search)' — all 35 points — read-only against the account via the Ads MCP, classify each point OK/warn/critical/no_data with the actual number behind it, locate findings to campaign › ad group › ad/asset, and output a .docx into the client's Drive folder with a compact Agent/Ekspert checklist up top + per-module detail below; stops and asks if the client's Drive folder doesn't exist yet, never auto-creates it; for deep per-ad RSA review it points to google-ads-optimization). For building NEW campaigns see google-ads-setup; for live-account tuning see google-ads-optimization. Danish-default.

inbound_root_folder_id.title: Inbound CPH Drive folder ID
inbound_root_folder_id.description: The Google Drive folder ID for the inbound-cph/ root folder where all client folders live. Defaults to the shared agency folder. Override only if you have a different mount.
